name: human-to-action
description: Explicitly refine agent instructions and route handoffs without automatic hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Turn human intent into agent-ready action
interface.longDescription: When explicitly invoked, refines same-task instructions internally or creates paste-ready prompts for handoffs, new tasks, new threads, new workspaces, other agents, and reusable artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Refine this instruction internally and continue
Audit this agent prompt without rewriting it
Create a paste-ready prompt for another agent
